x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: HR cases frequently contain sensitive personal data. Proper confidentiality classification prevents Now Assist from surfacing sensitive HR information in AI summaries or search results accessible to unauthorized users.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Configure HR case confidentiality levels via the HRSD confidentiality configuration. Assign confidentiality to cases containing sensitive employee information. Now Assist respects case confidentiality when generating summaries and search results.
